shortlist.notes: Cheapest rent, biggest build-out allowance, but not walking distance from Amanda's apartment and parking is a real student-side concern for evening classes. West Reading address qualifies for the Reading Beautification Storefront Activation Grant (sf-opp-003) which carries a 1:1 match requirement.

grant_jurisdiction_status.reading_beautification_storefront: IN jurisdiction. Eligible for the $15,000 storefront activation grant if Amanda can show $15,000 in match funding.
